posts.title: Building the Ultimate DIY NAS: ZimaBoard 2 Review & Benchmarks
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Build the ultimate compact DIY NAS with ZimaBoard 2. Leveraging ZimaOS and dual 2.5GbE, this energy-efficient kit simplifies backups, media streaming, and running virtual machines for your personal home lab

specifications.AI Capabilities:
CPU Only.
Expandable via PCIe (e.g., external GPU support)
specifications.Storage:
Onboard 32GB / 64GB eMMC
2 × SATA 3.0 6Gb/s Ports (with power)
Expandable via PCIe 3.0 slot
specifications.Operating System:
[ZimaOS](https://www.zimaspace.com/zimaos) (Pre-installed)
Supports CasaOS, Debian, Ubuntu, Windows, OpenWrt, pfSense
